goal: Close all outstanding branches from v3, complete the low-friction wave with a final verdict, then conditionally explore weak-window repair and medium-friction branches under strict gate discipline.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify the base snapshot.
Rejected branches must not be reopened: H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon.
Static high-IV regime is a volatility regime descriptor, not a directional signal.
Every branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted / rejected / formally-skipped) before any downstream gate unlocks.
Do not confuse a data task with a research result — feature materialization ≠ hypothesis validation.
Medium-friction wave is locked until every low-friction branch is closed and weak-window repair is completed.

slices.title: Только если A2 не promoted — полностью закрыть A3_broader_cl_transition
slices.hypothesis: If A2 was rejected, close the backup branch A3 (broader candlestick transition) with a full acceptance chain so it does not remain half-alive.
slices.objective: If A2 was rejected, close the backup branch A3 (broader candlestick transition) with a full acceptance chain so it does not remain half-alive.
success_criteria: A3_broader_cl_transition has a terminal decision (promoted or rejected or formally-skipped).
evidence_requirements: A3_broader_cl_transition has a terminal decision (promoted or rejected or formally-skipped).

slices.title: Общий вердикт по low-friction wave
slices.hypothesis: Produce a single definitive verdict on whether the low-friction exploration space has been exhausted.
slices.objective: Produce a single definitive verdict on whether the low-friction exploration space has been exhausted.
success_criteria: A single final verdict on low-friction wave is recorded and signed off.
evidence_requirements: A single final verdict on low-friction wave is recorded and signed off.

slices.title: Новая программа v4 — weak-window repair specialists
slices.hypothesis: Attempt targeted repair of the weakest performance pockets in the immutable base using narrowly scoped specialist hypotheses.
slices.objective: Attempt targeted repair of the weakest performance pockets in the immutable base using narrowly scoped specialist hypotheses.
success_criteria: Answer documented: can targeted repair produce meaningful improvement over the base or not.
evidence_requirements: Answer documented: can targeted repair produce meaningful improvement over the base or not.
